predicate_mappings.operational_readiness_flag: the operational readiness flag is set for {}

preconditions: I can only create a change window A if it is not the case that a change window exists for A and it is not the case that the window for A is closed
effects: Once I create a change window A, it is the case that a change window exists for A

assign_approver.description: assign an approver B to a change window A
preconditions: I can only assign an approver B to a change window A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and B is available as an approver and B is an eligible approver for the window A
I can only assign an approver B to a change window A if it is not the case that A has an assignment state
effects: Once I assign an approver B to a change window A, it is the case that B is assigned as an approver for A and A has an assignment state
Once I assign an approver B to a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an approver

revoke_approver.description: revoke an approver B from a change window A
preconditions: I can only revoke an approver B from a change window A if it is the case that B is assigned as an approver for A
I can only revoke an approver B from a change window A if it is not the case that the schedule for A is locked and it is not the case that pre execution checks for A have passed
effects: Once I revoke an approver B from a change window A, it is the case that B is available as an approver

Once I revoke an approver B from a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned as an approver for A and it is not the case anymore that A has an assignment state and it is not the case anymore that A is channel confirmed and it is not the case anymore that A is runbook validated and it is not the case anymore that escalation is used for A and it is not the case anymore that execution has started for A and it is not the case anymore that A has a special execution marker

reserve_channel.description: reserve a communication channel B for a change window A
preconditions: I can only reserve a communication channel B for a change window A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and B is available
effects: Once I reserve a communication channel B for a change window A, it is the case that B is reserved for the change window A
Once I reserve a communication channel B for a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_channel.description: release a communication channel B from a change window A
preconditions: I can only release a communication channel B from a change window A if it is the case that B is reserved for the change window A
effects: Once I release a communication channel B from a change window A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a communication channel B from a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for the change window A

confirm_channel.description: confirm a communication channel B for a change window A
preconditions: I can only confirm a communication channel B for a change window A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and A has an assignment state and B is reserved for the change window A
I can only confirm a communication channel B for a change window A if it is not the case that A is channel confirmed
effects: Once I confirm a communication channel B for a change window A, it is the case that A is channel confirmed

escalate_for_approval.description: escalate a change window A for approval to an escalation contact B
preconditions: I can only escalate a change window A for approval to an escalation contact B if it is the case that a change window exists for A and A has an assignment state and B is available as an escalation contact
I can only escalate a change window A for approval to an escalation contact B if it is not the case that A is channel confirmed
effects: Once I escalate a change window A for approval to an escalation contact B, it is the case that A is channel confirmed and escalation is used for A
Once I escalate a change window A for approval to an escalation contact B, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an escalation contact

validate_runbook.description: validate a runbook document C for a change window A using a communication channel B
preconditions: I can only validate a runbook document C for a change window A using a communication channel B if it is the case that A is channel confirmed and A has an assignment state and B is reserved for the change window A and C is present
I can only validate a runbook document C for a change window A using a communication channel B if it is not the case that A is runbook validated
effects: Once I validate a runbook document C for a change window A using a communication channel B, it is the case that A is runbook validated
Once I validate a runbook document C for a change window A using a communication channel B, it is not the case anymore that escalation is used for A

authorize_execution_step_runbook.description: authorize an execution step B in a change window A for runbook validation
preconditions: I can only authorize an execution step B in a change window A for runbook validation if it is the case that A has an assignment state and B is authorized in A
I can only authorize an execution step B in a change window A for runbook validation if it is not the case that A is runbook validated
effects: Once I authorize an execution step B in a change window A for runbook validation, it is the case that A is runbook validated
Once I authorize an execution step B in a change window A for runbook validation, it is not the case anymore that escalation is used for A

allocate_engineer.description: allocate an engineer B to a change window A
preconditions: I can only allocate an engineer B to a change window A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and B is available and A is mapped to the engineer B
effects: Once I allocate an engineer B to a change window A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I allocate an engineer B to a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_engineer.description: release an engineer B from a change window A
preconditions: I can only release an engineer B from a change window A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release an engineer B from a change window A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an engineer B from a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

allocate_component.description: allocate an affected component B to a change window A
preconditions: I can only allocate an affected component B to a change window A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and B is available and A is mapped to the affected component B
effects: Once I allocate an affected component B to a change window A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I allocate an affected component B to a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_component.description: release an affected component B from a change window A
preconditions: I can only release an affected component B from a change window A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release an affected component B from a change window A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an affected component B from a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

allocate_oncall.description: allocate an oncall contact B to a change window A
preconditions: I can only allocate an oncall contact B to a change window A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and B is available for on call duty and A is mapped to the on call contact B
effects: Once I allocate an oncall contact B to a change window A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I allocate an oncall contact B to a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for on call duty

release_oncall.description: release an oncall contact B from a change window A
preconditions: I can only release an oncall contact B from a change window A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release an oncall contact B from a change window A, it is the case that B is available for on call duty
Once I release an oncall contact B from a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

link_risk_assessment.description: link a risk assessment B to a change window A
preconditions: I can only link a risk assessment B to a change window A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and B is available and A is mapped to the risk assessment B
effects: Once I link a risk assessment B to a change window A, it is the case that B is linked to A
Once I link a risk assessment B to a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unlink_risk_assessment.description: unlink a risk assessment B from a change window A
preconditions: I can only unlink a risk assessment B from a change window A if it is the case that B is linked to A
effects: Once I unlink a risk assessment B from a change window A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unlink a risk assessment B from a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is linked to A

schedule_window_slot.description: schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an engineer C affecting an affected component D
preconditions: I can only schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an engineer C affecting an affected component D if it is the case that A has an assignment state and C is allocated to A and D is allocated to A and B is available and A is mapped to the time slot B
I can only schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an engineer C affecting an affected component D if it is not the case that the schedule for A is locked
effects: Once I schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an engineer C affecting an affected component D, it is the case that A is scheduled for B and the schedule for A is locked
Once I schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an engineer C affecting an affected component D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

schedule_window_with_oncall_env.description: schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an oncall contact C in an environment D
preconditions: I can only schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an oncall contact C in an environment D if it is the case that A has an assignment state and C is allocated to A and D is reserved and B is available and A is mapped to the time slot B and A is mapped to the environment D
I can only schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an oncall contact C in an environment D if it is not the case that the schedule for A is locked
effects: Once I schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an oncall contact C in an environment D, it is the case that A is scheduled for B and the schedule for A is locked and A has a special execution marker and escalation is used for A
Once I schedule a change window A for a time slot B with an oncall contact C in an environment D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is reserved

clear_special_execution_marker.description: clear special execution marker from a change window A with an engineer B for an affected component C
preconditions: I can only clear special execution marker from a change window A with an engineer B for an affected component C if it is the case that the schedule for A is locked and A has a special execution marker and B is allocated to A and C is allocated to A
effects: Once I clear special execution marker from a change window A with an engineer B for an affected component C, it is not the case anymore that A has a special execution marker and it is not the case anymore that escalation is used for A

perform_pre_execution_checks.description: perform pre execution checks for a change window A with an engineer B, an affected component C, and a technical stakeholder D
preconditions: I can only perform pre execution checks for a change window A with an engineer B, an affected component C, and a technical stakeholder D if it is the case that A is runbook validated and the schedule for A is locked and B is allocated to A and C is allocated to A and A is mapped to the stakeholder D

I can only perform pre execution checks for a change window A with an engineer B, an affected component C, and a technical stakeholder D if it is not the case that escalation is used for A and it is not the case that pre execution checks for A have passed
effects: Once I perform pre execution checks for a change window A with an engineer B, an affected component C, and a technical stakeholder D, it is the case that pre execution checks for A have passed

perform_cross_domain_checks.description: perform cross domain checks for a change window A with an oncall contact B, a risk assessment C, and a business stakeholder D
preconditions: I can only perform cross domain checks for a change window A with an oncall contact B, a risk assessment C, and a business stakeholder D if it is the case that A is runbook validated and the schedule for A is locked and B is allocated to A and C is linked to A and A is mapped to the stakeholder D

I can only perform cross domain checks for a change window A with an oncall contact B, a risk assessment C, and a business stakeholder D if it is not the case that pre execution checks for A have passed
effects: Once I perform cross domain checks for a change window A with an oncall contact B, a risk assessment C, and a business stakeholder D, it is the case that pre execution checks for A have passed and escalation is used for A

mark_execution_started.description: mark execution as started for a change window A with an engineer B and an affected component C
preconditions: I can only mark execution as started for a change window A with an engineer B and an affected component C if it is the case that pre execution checks for A have passed and escalation is used for A and B is allocated to A and C is allocated to A
effects: Once I mark execution as started for a change window A with an engineer B and an affected component C, it is the case that execution has started for A

Once I mark execution as started for a change window A with an engineer B and an affected component C, it is not the case anymore that escalation is used for A and it is not the case anymore that A is runbook validated and it is not the case anymore that A has a special execution marker

validate_runbook_during_execution.description: validate runbook during execution for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C
preconditions: I can only validate runbook during execution for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C if it is the case that execution has started for A and pre execution checks for A have passed and A has an assignment state and B is reserved for the change window A and C is present
I can only validate runbook during execution for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C if it is not the case that A is runbook validated
effects: Once I validate runbook during execution for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C, it is the case that A is runbook validated

verify_channel.description: verify a communication channel B for a change window A
preconditions: I can only verify a communication channel B for a change window A if it is the case that pre execution checks for A have passed and A is runbook validated and B is reserved for the change window A
I can only verify a communication channel B for a change window A if it is not the case that escalation is used for A and it is not the case that the channel for A is verified
effects: Once I verify a communication channel B for a change window A, it is the case that the channel for A is verified

verify_channel_with_escalation.description: verify channel for a change window A with an escalation contact B
preconditions: I can only verify channel for a change window A with an escalation contact B if it is the case that pre execution checks for A have passed and A is runbook validated and B is available as an escalation contact
I can only verify channel for a change window A with an escalation contact B if it is not the case that escalation is used for A and it is not the case that the channel for A is verified
effects: Once I verify channel for a change window A with an escalation contact B, it is the case that the channel for A is verified
Once I verify channel for a change window A with an escalation contact B, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an escalation contact

bind_step_to_variant.description: bind an execution step B to variant in a change window A
preconditions: I can only bind an execution step B to variant in a change window A if it is the case that the channel for A is verified and B is open and A has an initial variant mapping with B
effects: Once I bind an execution step B to variant in a change window A, it is the case that A has a variant step relation with B
Once I bind an execution step B to variant in a change window A, it is not the case anymore that B is open

authorize_step_across_variants.description: authorize an execution step C across variants from a window variant a window variant a B to a window variant b A
preconditions: I can only authorize an execution step C across variants from a window variant a window variant a B to a window variant b A if it is the case that a change window exists for A and A requires cross variant coordination and A has variant execution authority for C and B has a variant step relation with C
I can only authorize an execution step C across variants from a window variant a window variant a B to a window variant b A if it is not the case that C is authorized in A
effects: Once I authorize an execution step C across variants from a window variant a window variant a B to a window variant b A, it is the case that C is authorized in A

mark_operational_readiness.description: mark operational readiness for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C
preconditions: I can only mark operational readiness for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C if it is the case that a change window exists for A and A requires cross variant coordination and A is runbook validated and the channel for A is verified and B is reserved for the change window A and C is present
I can only mark operational readiness for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C if it is not the case that the operational readiness flag is set for A
effects: Once I mark operational readiness for a change window A using a communication channel B and a runbook document C, it is the case that the operational readiness flag is set for A

auto_finalize_window.description: auto finalize a change window A
preconditions: I can only auto finalize a change window A if it is the case that A is eligible for auto finalization and a change window exists for A and A has an assignment state and the schedule for A is locked and pre execution checks for A have passed and the channel for A is verified and A is runbook validated
I can only auto finalize a change window A if it is not the case that the window for A is closed
effects: Once I auto finalize a change window A, it is the case that the window for A is closed

finalize_window_with_step_authorization.description: finalize a change window A with an execution step B authorization
preconditions: I can only finalize a change window A with an execution step B authorization if it is the case that A requires cross variant coordination and a change window exists for A and A has an assignment state and the schedule for A is locked and pre execution checks for A have passed and the channel for A is verified and A is runbook validated and B is authorized in A
I can only finalize a change window A with an execution step B authorization if it is not the case that the window for A is closed
effects: Once I finalize a change window A with an execution step B authorization, it is the case that the window for A is closed

finalize_window_after_operational_readin.description: finalize a change window A after operational readiness
preconditions: I can only finalize a change window A after operational readiness if it is the case that A requires cross variant coordination and a change window exists for A and A has an assignment state and the schedule for A is locked and pre execution checks for A have passed and the channel for A is verified and A is runbook validated and the operational readiness flag is set for A
I can only finalize a change window A after operational readiness if it is not the case that the window for A is closed
effects: Once I finalize a change window A after operational readiness, it is the case that the window for A is closed

action_nl_templates.release_channel: release communication channel {?communication_channel} from change window {?change_window}

action_nl_templates.unlink_risk_assessment: unlink risk assessment {?risk_assessment} from change window {?change_window}

action_nl_templates.perform_pre_execution_checks: perform pre-execution checks for change window {?change_window} with engineer {?engineer}, affected component {?affected_component}, and technical stakeholder {?technical_stakeholder}
action_nl_templates.perform_cross_domain_checks: perform cross-domain checks for change window {?change_window} with oncall contact {?oncall_contact}, risk assessment {?risk_assessment}, and business stakeholder {?business_stakeholder}

action_nl_templates.authorize_step_across_variants: authorize execution step {?execution_step} across variants from window variant a {?window_variant_a} to window variant b {?window_variant_b}

action_nl_templates.finalize_window_after_operational_readin: finalize change window {?change_window} after operational readiness

predicate_nl_templates.assigned_approver: {?approver} is assigned as an approver for {?change_window}
predicate_nl_templates.operational_readiness_flag: the operational readiness flag is set for {?change_window}
predicate_nl_templates.escalation_contact_available: {?escalation_contact} is available as an escalation contact
predicate_nl_templates.eligible_approver_for_window: {?approver} is an eligible approver for the window {?change_window}
predicate_nl_templates.window_time_slot_mapping: {?change_window} is mapped to the time slot {?time_slot}
predicate_nl_templates.window_component_mapping: {?change_window} is mapped to the affected component {?affected_component}
predicate_nl_templates.window_oncall_mapping: {?change_window} is mapped to the on-call contact {?oncall_contact}
predicate_nl_templates.window_risk_mapping: {?change_window} is mapped to the risk assessment {?risk_assessment}
predicate_nl_templates.variant_step_relation: {?change_window} has a variant step relation with {?execution_step}
predicate_nl_templates.channel_reserved_for_window: {?communication_channel} is reserved for the change window {?change_window}
predicate_nl_templates.initial_variant_mapping: {?change_window} has an initial variant mapping with {?execution_step}

action_nl_templates_indef.assign_approver: assign an approver {?approver} to a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_approver: revoke an approver {?approver} from a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_channel: reserve a communication channel {?communication_channel} for a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_channel: release a communication channel {?communication_channel} from a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_channel: confirm a communication channel {?communication_channel} for a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_for_approval: escalate a change window {?change_window} for approval to an escalation contact {?escalation_contact}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_runbook: validate a runbook document {?runbook_document} for a change window {?change_window} using a communication channel {?communication_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_execution_step_runbook: authorize an execution step {?execution_step} in a change window {?change_window} for runbook validation
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_engineer: allocate an engineer {?engineer} to a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_engineer: release an engineer {?engineer} from a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_component: allocate an affected component {?affected_component} to a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_component: release an affected component {?affected_component} from a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_oncall: allocate an oncall contact {?oncall_contact} to a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_oncall: release an oncall contact {?oncall_contact} from a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_risk_assessment: link a risk assessment {?risk_assessment} to a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_risk_assessment: unlink a risk assessment {?risk_assessment} from a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_window_slot: schedule a change window {?change_window} for a time slot {?time_slot} with an engineer {?engineer} affecting an affected component {?affected_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.schedule_window_with_oncall_env: schedule a change window {?change_window} for a time slot {?time_slot} with an oncall contact {?oncall_contact} in an environment {?environment}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_special_execution_marker: clear special execution marker from a change window {?change_window} with an engineer {?engineer} for an affected component {?affected_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_pre_execution_checks: perform pre-execution checks for a change window {?change_window} with an engineer {?engineer}, an affected component {?affected_component}, and a technical stakeholder {?technical_stakeholder}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_cross_domain_checks: perform cross-domain checks for a change window {?change_window} with an oncall contact {?oncall_contact}, a risk assessment {?risk_assessment}, and a business stakeholder {?business_stakeholder}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_execution_started: mark execution as started for a change window {?change_window} with an engineer {?engineer} and an affected component {?affected_component}
action_nl_templates_indef.validate_runbook_during_execution: validate runbook during execution for a change window {?change_window} using a communication channel {?communication_channel} and a runbook document {?runbook_document}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_channel: verify a communication channel {?communication_channel} for a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.verify_channel_with_escalation: verify channel for a change window {?change_window} with an escalation contact {?escalation_contact}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_step_to_variant: bind an execution step {?execution_step} to variant in a change window {?change_window}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_step_across_variants: authorize an execution step {?execution_step} across variants from a window variant a window variant a {?window_variant_a} to a window variant b {?window_variant_b}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_operational_readiness: mark operational readiness for a change window {?change_window} using a communication channel {?communication_channel} and a runbook document {?runbook_document}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_window_with_step_authorization: finalize a change window {?change_window} with an execution step {?execution_step} authorization
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_window_after_operational_readin: finalize a change window {?change_window} after operational readiness

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a change window or a approver or a time slot or a affected component or a engineer or a oncall contact or a communication channel or a escalation contact or a execution step or a runbook document or a environment or a risk assessment or a stakeholder is also a object
Everything that is a technical stakeholder or a business stakeholder is also a stakeholder
Everything that is a window variant a or a window variant b is also a change window
